title: The Straw Hats Are Pulled Apart
description: On pages 12–15, this part follows Unknown person #1, Unknown person #2, Trafalgar Law, Unknown person #4, Unknown person #5, Unknown person #6, Unknown person #7. The central beat is the straw hats are pulled apart.
scene: The scene focuses on the straw hats are pulled apart, with Unknown person #1, Unknown person #2, Trafalgar Law, Unknown person #4, Unknown person #5, Unknown person #6, Unknown person #7 shaping the Punk Hazard conflict.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: ...I mustn't let them get away, either...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #2
dialogue.text: HAYHHHH!! Hurry up, kids, this way!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #2
dialogue.text: I doubt that is the case, but...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #5
dialogue.text: Hm? Where did my cigarette go...?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #8
dialogue.text: We can't fight a guy like this!!!

summary: The Straw Hats Are Pulled Apart. This part advances Punk Hazard’s rescue mission, Caesar’s experiment, and the fragile pirate–Marine alliance.
